title: Use Codex-compatible strict JSON schemas
problem: The first real Codex run rejected the output schema because structured output requires explicit types and stricter object shapes.
proposed_change: Keep the runtime GraphDelta schema compatible with Codex --output-schema, including typed const fields, required properties, and closed evidence objects.
acceptance_criteria: A real Codex extraction accepts the schema and writes a validated delta.

history.note: Real mr4660140 extraction accepted after schema tightening.
